creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177599
Patch to fix openssl 1.1. compatibility

Pulseaudio does not compile with OpenSSL 1.1 due to member access of now opaque structures.

Verbatim patch already applied and forthcoming upstream.

Obtained from:  https://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=96726
